content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian came to the Holy Medicine Garden.

The Holy Medicine Garden is very large, covering a large area, and this area is relatively special, which has given birth to a large number of semi-holy medicines and holy medicines.

And the cultivation of each semi-holy medicine and holy medicine has its own realm, because they are all manifestations of rules, manifestations of forbidden paths.

Therefore, it is necessary to enter the realm to obtain the semi-holy medicine or holy medicine.

At this moment, the geniuses of the Unified Realm of the Dark Destruction Domain in this area were fighting to snatch the Half-Holy Medicine and the Holy Medicine.

Ye Tian cast the Divine Gift of stealth and infiltrated over.

As long as he didn't do anything, these people couldn't spy on his existence.

Soon, Ye Tian came to a place where the holy medicine was born.

At this time, the two geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain of the One Realm here rushed into the land of the Holy Medicine Realm, and while fighting, they approached the Holy Medicine.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian appeared and took this holy medicine.

"Who?"

The two geniuses of the One Realm were very angry, they fought each other, causing their speed to be a little slower, but they were taken away by others, and they secretly took the holy medicine, which was simply too infuriating.

At this moment, a golden thread slashed.

Poof!

The two Returning to the One Realm geniuses were killed in an instant.

And Ye Tian came to the place where they fell, collected their corpses, and then probed the treasures on their bodies through their internal space.

"So poor!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Before, he had learned from the Battle Gate that the Dark Destruction Domain was very barren, because it was full of destructive energy, and although it was helpful for their cultivation, it was difficult to generate some resources.

The Saints of Destruction are a race born from destruction, based on the destruction of everything.

Even if they occupy a realm, they will destroy it, and use a realm to improve their cultivation strength, which is the destruction of the Holy Clan.

As a result, they only invaded the territory of the Dark Sanctuary and plundered resources, and they had no habit of cultivating resources at all.

If the resources of the Destruction Saint Ancestor are scarce to a certain extent, I am afraid that they will have to attack the Dark Sacred Domain.

Regardless of whether it can win or not, it will definitely be able to snatch some resources, and it can eliminate some weak ones and reduce the burden of the Dark Destruction Domain.

This is why the Dark Destruction Domain has been fighting against the Dark Sanctuary, but many people don't know it.

It is estimated that the resources of these two geniuses of the One Realm have been consumed by them, and there are some inheritances or weapons, but they are of little use to Ye Tian, but they still have valuable treasures on them.

These valuable treasures were those semi-holy medicines and holy medicines, they had only been picking them for a short time, so they hadn't had time to refine them, so they naturally cheapened Ye Tian.

Next, Ye Tian plundered the semi-holy medicine and the holy medicine, but he didn't see the ancestral medicine.

Ancestral medicine is very rare, the value is comparable to a low-level holy relic, once it appears, it will inevitably cause countless battles in the One Realm.

Even the geniuses of the Destruction Saint Clan will fight desperately, after all, how can a genius of the Guiyi Realm be qualified to obtain a treasure like the ancestral medicine!

For example, Ye Tian, if he hadn't won the first place in the Holy War, he would not have been given holy relics.

And the Dark Sanctuary is rich in resources, so he is willing to take out the holy relics as a reward.

The Dark Destruction Domain is different, they are not willing to give such a reward to the geniuses, if it falls, it will be a loss.

Moreover, the powerhouses of the Dark Destruction Domain are more selfish.

For example, this time when entering the Holy Gold Realm, except for the resources that have been refined, other resources must be handed over, which is the rule.

"It's best to find a few ancestral medicines, then after you go back, you can let Yue'er and their strength improve quickly!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

As time passed, Ye Tian seized a large number of semi-holy medicines and a small number of holy medicines, and also killed many geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain.

At first, the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain did not realize that there were geniuses of the Dark Sanctuary who were slaughtering them.

But as more and more geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain fell, something was wrong with them.

Sometime.

Ye Tian was ready to kill a Destruction Saint Clan genius of a double overlimiter with one blow, but he was unable to kill the other party with one blow, because the other party had a very powerful life-saving thing on his body, and he died once.

"Genius of the Dark Sanctuary!"

Before he died, the genius of the Saint Clan of Destruction spread the news.

Burst!

Under the second blow, the Destruction Orb genius was completely lost, but the news had already spread.

"Trouble!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Sure enough.

A large number of geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain began to search for Ye Tian's traces in groups, trying to surround and kill him,

Because once he is killed, those Supreme Domain Ancestors will be rewarded with a lot.

However, ordinary Returning Realm geniuses couldn't find Ye Tian at all.

The stealth talent of the Holy Endowment level, even if it is far inferior to the Holy Skill, is not something that ordinary people can peep on.

But if there is a genius who has mastered the Perfection Domain Technique of spying on the secret art of stealth, then he can still detect his traces.

Of course, many races in the Dark Destruction Domain didn't practice much, and it was difficult to discover Ye Tian's existence by relying entirely on bloodline talent and secret arts ability.

But the Destruction Holy Clan is also a cultivator, and it is actually similar to a cultivator, but the bloodline is special, and the destruction of everything is the source of growth.

Therefore, it is highly likely that the geniuses of the Saint Clan will find his traces.

In addition, some domain weapons, if they can break through the stealth, can also detect him.

Therefore, it was not realistic for Ye Tian to completely steal and avoid the search of the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain.

Sure enough, Ye Tian was soon discovered.

Suddenly, dozens of geniuses from the Dark Destruction Domain surrounded and killed.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian used his holy technique and easily killed this group of geniuses, including three geniuses at the level of the double superlimiter.

Next, one by one the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain besieged and killed Ye Tian, and they all died at Ye Tian's hands, sending a large number of semi-holy medicines and holy medicines.

As more and more geniuses died, many geniuses in the Dark Destruction Domain were intimidated and did not dare to look for Ye Tian again, and only a few Saint Grants wanted to kill Ye Tian.

In a state of stealth, Ye Tian kept shuttling.

Suddenly.

He sensed that a group of Guiyi Realms were shuttling in a certain direction, and seemed to be in a hurry.

Ye Tian was curious and followed.

Soon they reached their destination.

At this time, Ye Tian knew what the goal of these people was, it was not him, but the ancestral medicine.

An ancestral medicine was born!
